title: Four former DOGE staffers raised $160 million at a $1.4 billion valuation for an AI military cyber startup
summary: Cathedral, a stealth military cybersecurity startup founded by four former Department of Government Efficiency staffers, has raised $160 million at a $1.4 billion valuation. The funding underscores how DOGE alumni are converting government access into venture capital.
